falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a strong upward trend contrary to the current uncertainty.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A major policy shift introducing unanticipated liquidity would contradict the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by creating a new, observable catalyst for market movement.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks below the 2024 August bottom level by 2% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed breakdown of the key support level would falsify the pattern's similarity to a bottom, proving the current 'HOLD' call incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
